source.reference: 12ga 70mm (2 3/4") hunting load. #7.5 shot (~2.4mm / 0.095" per pellet). ~350 pellets @ ~0.08g each, total shot mass ~28g. MV ~400 m/s. Pattern spread ~4% of range (typical improved cylinder choke).
source.methodology: Values estimated from typical shotgun shot pellet counts and velocities for standard hunting loads.

projectile.notes: shotgun — multi-projectile (pellets), uses custom drag/spread model. Individual pellet penetration ~0.5-1.0mm RHAe at close range.
